name: agent-swarm-claude-only
description: LLM routing and subagent delegation using Claude models only. Routes tasks to efficient Claude models (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus) based on complexity. Requires Anthropic API key configured in OpenClaw.
author: Austin

config.anthropic_api_key: Required: Anthropic API key must be configured in OpenClaw platform settings
config.openclaw_json: Reads tools.exec.host and tools.exec.node from openclaw.json (located via OPENCLAW_HOME or ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json)
